title: stelis patella
intro: Stelis patella, also known as the Purple Bird-Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Stelis patella include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Stelis patella can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to treat various health conditions or as a natural remedy for common illnesses.
